title: Payment API P99 Latency > 30s
description: payment-api pod-3 OOMKilled. P99 latency spiked to 32s (baseline: 200ms). Connection pool exhausted with 312 requests queued.

title: Order Service Error Rate 23%
description: order-service error rate at 23.4% (baseline 0.1%). Cascading from upstream payment-api failure. Circuit breaker OPEN.

title: Notification Service Email Delivery Failing
description: SendGrid returning 429 (rate limited). 8934 emails queued. Non-critical — customers receive emails with delay.
